case_title: HOWARD XI LAM VS. BAO ZHEN HUANG

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, HOWARD XI AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, BAO ZHEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
